ksa_text: Knowledge of data collection and gathering methods, including data sourcing techniques, data monitoring tools, systematic data acquisition approaches, and the assessment of data availability and fitness for analytical use.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge case — excluded on balance: knowledge from Analytics & BI (domain affinity 0.28); strategic/governance framing outweighs technical signals. STRM composite score is moderate-to-strong (0.4066). A working DE would be aware of but not accountable for this competency.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 1 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
